Table.Name: Command
Table.Command: SELECT T0."DocNum" AS "DocEntry", T0."DueDate", T0."CheckNum", T1."BankName", T0."Branch", T0."AcctNum", T0."CheckSum", T0."Currency" FROM "RCT1" T0 LEFT JOIN "ODSC" T1 ON T0."BankCode" = T1."BankCode" WHERE T0."DocNum" = {?ChecksSubDocKey@}

Table.Name: Command
Table.Command: SELECT T0."DocNum" AS "DocEntry", T1."CardName" AS "CreditCardName", T0."OwnerIdNum", T0."CreditType", T0."NumOfPmnts", T0."CreditSum", T0."CreditCur" FROM "RCT3" T0 LEFT JOIN "OCRC" T1 ON T0."CreditCard" = T1."CreditCard" WHERE T0."DocNum" = {?CreditSubDocKey@}

Table.Name: Command
Table.Command: --{?ObjectId@} SELECT T0."DocEntry", T0."DocNum", T0."DocDate", T0."DocDueDate", T0."CardCode", T0."CardName", T0."Address", T0."Printed", T1."Name" AS "ContactPerson", T0."DdctPrcnt" AS "DeductionPercentage", CASE WHEN T0."DdctSumFC" <> 0 THEN T0."DdctSumFC" ELSE T0."DdctSum" END AS "DeductionSum", CASE WHEN T0."CashSumFC" <> 0 THEN T0."CashSumFC" ELSE T0."CashSum" END AS "CashSum", CASE WHEN T0."CredSumFC" <> 0 THEN T0."CredSumFC" ELSE T0."CreditSum" END AS "CreditSum", CASE WHEN T0."CheckSumFC" <> 0 THEN T0."CheckSumFC" ELSE T0."CheckSum" END AS "CheckSum", CASE WHEN T0."TrsfrSumFC" <> 0 THEN T0."TrsfrSumFC" ELSE T0."TrsfrSum" END AS "TransferSum", CASE WHEN T0."NoDocSumFC" <> 0 THEN T0."NoDocSumFC" ELSE T0."NoDocSum" END AS "PaymentOnAccountSum", CASE WHEN T0."DocTotalFC" <> 0 THEN T0."DocTotalFC" ELSE T0."DocTotal" END AS "DocTotal", T0."TrsfrDate" AS "TransferDate", T0."DocCurr", T0."Comments", T0."JrnlMemo", T0."TransId", T2.U_NAME AS "CreateBy" FROM "{?$[BOY_TABLE]}" T0 LEFT OUTER JOIN OCPR T1 ON T0."CntctCode" = T1."CntctCode" INNER JOIN OUSR T2 ON T0."UserSign" = T2.INTERNAL_K WHERE T0."DocEntry" = {?DocKey@}

Table.Name: Command
Table.Command: SELECT T0."DocNum" AS "DocEntry", T0."InvType", CASE T0."InvType" WHEN 13 THEN (SELECT TS0."DocNum" FROM OINV TS0 WHERE TS0."DocEntry" = T0."DocEntry") WHEN 14 THEN (SELECT TS0."DocNum" FROM ORIN TS0 WHERE TS0."DocEntry" = T0."DocEntry") WHEN 18 THEN (SELECT TS0."DocNum" FROM OPCH TS0 WHERE TS0."DocEntry" = T0."DocEntry") WHEN 203 THEN (SELECT TS0."DocNum" FROM ODPI TS0 WHERE TS0."DocEntry" = T0."DocEntry") WHEN 204 THEN (SELECT TS0."DocNum" FROM ODPO TS0 WHERE TS0."DocEntry" = T0."DocEntry") WHEN 19 THEN (SELECT TS0."DocNum" FROM ORPC TS0 WHERE TS0."DocEntry" = T0."DocEntry") WHEN 30 THEN (SELECT TS0."Number" FROM OJDT TS0 WHERE TS0."TransId" = T0."DocEntry") WHEN -2 THEN (SELECT TS0."Number" FROM OJDT TS0 WHERE TS0."TransId" = T0."DocEntry") END AS "PaidDocNum", CASE T0."InvType" WHEN 13 THEN (SELECT TS0."NumAtCard" FROM OINV TS0 WHERE TS0."DocEntry" = T0."DocEntry") WHEN 14 THEN (SELECT TS0."NumAtCard" FROM ORIN TS0 WHERE TS0."DocEntry" = T0."DocEntry") WHEN 18 THEN (SELECT TS0."NumAtCard" FROM OPCH TS0 WHERE TS0."DocEntry" = T0."DocEntry") WHEN 19 THEN (SELECT TS0."NumAtCard" FROM ORPC TS0 WHERE TS0."DocEntry" = T0."DocEntry") WHEN 203 THEN (SELECT TS0."NumAtCard" FROM ODPI TS0 WHERE TS0."DocEntry" = T0."DocEntry") WHEN 204 THEN (SELECT TS0."NumAtCard" FROM ODPO TS0 WHERE TS0."DocEntry" = T0."DocEntry") WHEN 30 THEN (SELECT CAST(TS0."Number" AS nvarchar(100)) FROM OJDT TS0 WHERE TS0."TransId" = T0."DocEntry") WHEN -2 THEN (SELECT CAST(TS0."Number" AS nvarchar(100)) FROM OJDT TS0 WHERE TS0."TransId" = T0."DocEntry") END AS "PaidDocRef", CASE T0."InvType" WHEN 13 THEN (SELECT TS0."DocCur" FROM OINV TS0 WHERE TS0."DocEntry" = T0."DocEntry") WHEN 14 THEN (SELECT TS0."DocCur" FROM ORIN TS0 WHERE TS0."DocEntry" = T0."DocEntry") WHEN 18 THEN (SELECT TS0."DocCur" FROM OPCH TS0 WHERE TS0."DocEntry" = T0."DocEntry") WHEN 19 THEN (SELECT TS0."DocCur" FROM ORPC TS0 WHERE TS0."DocEntry" = T0."DocEntry") WHEN 203 THEN (SELECT TS0."DocCur" FROM ODPI TS0 WHERE TS0."DocEntry" = T0."DocEntry") WHEN 204 THEN (SELECT TS0."DocCur" FROM ODPO TS0 WHERE TS0."DocEntry" = T0."DocEntry") WHEN 30 THEN (SELECT TS0."TransCurr" FROM OJDT TS0 WHERE TS0."TransId" = T0."DocEntry") WHEN -2 THEN (SELECT TS0."TransCurr" FROM OJDT TS0 WHERE TS0."TransId" = T0."DocEntry") END AS "PaidDocCurrency", CASE T0."InvType" WHEN 13 THEN (SELECT TS0."DocDate" FROM OINV TS0 WHERE TS0."DocEntry" = T0."DocEntry") WHEN 14 THEN (SELECT TS0."DocDate" FROM ORIN TS0 WHERE TS0."DocEntry" = T0."DocEntry") WHEN 18 THEN (SELECT TS0."DocDate" FROM OPCH TS0 WHERE TS0."DocEntry" = T0."DocEntry") WHEN 19 THEN (SELECT TS0."DocDate" FROM ORPC TS0 WHERE TS0."DocEntry" = T0."DocEntry") WHEN 203 THEN (SELECT TS0."DocDate" FROM ODPI TS0 WHERE TS0."DocEntry" = T0."DocEntry") WHEN 204 THEN (SELECT TS0."DocDate" FROM ODPO TS0 WHERE TS0."DocEntry" = T0."DocEntry") WHEN 30 THEN (SELECT TS0."RefDate" FROM OJDT TS0 WHERE TS0."TransId" = T0."DocEntry") WHEN -2 THEN (SELECT TS0."RefDate" FROM OJDT TS0 WHERE TS0."TransId" = T0."DocEntry") END AS "PaidDocDate", CASE WHEN T0."AppliedFC" <> 0 THEN T0."AppliedFC" ELSE T0."SumApplied" END AS "PaidDocAmount" FROM "{?$[BOY_TABLE_IDENTIFIER]}2" T0 WHERE T0."DocNum" = {?DocKey@}

Table.Name: Command
Table.Command: SELECT IFNULL(T0."CompnyName", '') AS "Name", IFNULL(T0."CompnyAddr", '') AS "AddressFull", IFNULL(T1."Street", '') AS "AddressStreet", IFNULL(T1."Block", '') AS "AddressBlock", IFNULL(T1."City", '') AS "AddressCity", IFNULL(T1."ZipCode", '') AS "AddressZipCode", IFNULL(T1."County", '') AS "AddressCounty", IFNULL(T1."State", '') AS "AddressState", IFNULL(T0."Country", '') AS "AddressCountry", IFNULL(T0."Phone1", '') AS "Phone1", IFNULL(T0."Phone2", '') AS "Phone2", IFNULL(T0."Fax", '') AS "Fax", IFNULL(T0."E_Mail", '') AS "Email", IFNULL(T0."Manager", '') AS "Manager", IFNULL(T0."MainCurncy", '') AS "LocalCurrency", IFNULL(T0."SysCurrncy", '') AS "SystemCurrency", IFNULL(T0."TaxIdNum", '') AS "FederalTaxId", IFNULL(T0."TaxIdNum2", '') AS "FederalTaxId2", IFNULL(T0."TaxIdNum3", '') AS "FederalTaxId3", IFNULL(T0."FreeZoneNo", '') AS "AdditionalId", IFNULL(T0."RevOffice", '') AS "TaxOffice", IFNULL(T0."CaredType", '') AS "PayInFormType", IFNULL(T0."PBSNumber", '') AS "PayInFormNumber", IFNULL(T0."PBSGroupNo", '') AS "PayInFormGroupNumber", IFNULL(T1."IntrntAdrs", '') AS "Website", IFNULL(T0."PrintHeadr", '') AS "PrintHeader", IFNULL(T0."XmlPath", '') AS "PathXml", IFNULL(T0."ExcelPath", '') AS "PathExcel", IFNULL(T2."WordPath", '') AS "PathWord", IFNULL(T2."BitmapPath", '') AS "PathBitmap", IFNULL(T2."AttachPath", '') AS "PathAttach", IFNULL(T2."ExtPath", '') AS "PathExtension", IFNULL(T0."BankCountr", '') AS "BankCountry", IFNULL(T0."DflBnkCode", '') AS "BankCode", (SELECT IFNULL(TS0."BankName", '') FROM ODSC TS0 WHERE TS0."CountryCod" = T0."BankCountr" AND TS0."BankCode" = T0."DflBnkCode") AS "BankName", (SELECT IFNULL(TS0."SwiftNum", '') FROM ODSC TS0 WHERE TS0."CountryCod" = T0."BankCountr" AND TS0."BankCode" = T0."DflBnkCode") AS "BankSwift", (SELECT IFNULL(TS0.IBAN, '') FROM DSC1 TS0 WHERE TS0."Country" = T0."BankCountr" AND TS0."BankCode" = T0."DflBnkCode" AND TS0."Branch" = T0."DflBranch" AND TS0."Account" = T0."DflBnkAcct") AS "BankIban", (SELECT IFNULL(TS0."Street", '') FROM DSC1 TS0 WHERE TS0."Country" = T0."BankCountr" AND TS0."BankCode" = T0."DflBnkCode" AND TS0."Branch" = T0."DflBranch" AND TS0."Account" = T0."DflBnkAcct") AS "BankStreet", (SELECT IFNULL(TS0."Block", '') FROM DSC1 TS0 WHERE TS0."Country" = T0."BankCountr" AND TS0."BankCode" = T0."DflBnkCode" AND TS0."Branch" = T0."DflBranch" AND TS0."Account" = T0."DflBnkAcct") AS "BankBlock", (SELECT IFNULL(TS0."City", '') FROM DSC1 TS0 WHERE TS0."Country" = T0."BankCountr" AND TS0."BankCode" = T0."DflBnkCode" AND TS0."Branch" = T0."DflBranch" AND TS0."Account" = T0."DflBnkAcct") AS "BankCity", (SELECT IFNULL(TS0."County", '') FROM DSC1 TS0 WHERE TS0."Country" = T0."BankCountr" AND TS0."BankCode" = T0."DflBnkCode" AND TS0."Branch" = T0."DflBranch" AND TS0."Account" = T0."DflBnkAcct") AS "BankCounty", (SELECT IFNULL(TS0."State", '') FROM DSC1 TS0 WHERE TS0."Country" = T0."BankCountr" AND TS0."BankCode" = T0."DflBnkCode" AND TS0."Branch" = T0."DflBranch" AND TS0."Account" = T0."DflBnkAcct") AS "BankState", (SELECT IFNULL(TS0."ZipCode", '') FROM DSC1 TS0 WHERE TS0."Country" = T0."BankCountr" AND TS0."BankCode" = T0."DflBnkCode" AND TS0."Branch" = T0."DflBranch" AND TS0."Account" = T0."DflBnkAcct") AS "BankZipCode", IFNULL(T0."DflBnkAcct", '') AS "BankAccount", IFNULL(T0."DflBranch", '') AS "BankBranch", IFNULL(T0."HldCode", '') AS "HolidayCode", IFNULL(T0."MultiLang", '') AS "MultiLanguageSupport", IFNULL(T2."LogoFile", '') AS "Logo" FROM OADM T0 INNER JOIN ADM1 T1 ON 1 = 1 INNER JOIN OADP T2 ON 1 = 1

FormulaFieldDefinitions.FormulaFieldDefinition:
switch ( {?ObjectId@} = '24', switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Indgående betaling', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Eingangszahlung', True, 'Incoming Payment' //Default English ),
{?ObjectId@} = '46', switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Udgående betaling', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Ausgangszahlung', True, 'Outgoing Payment' //Default English ), TRUE, 'UNKNOWN TYPE' )
switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Total Kredit', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Total Kredit', True, 'Total Credit' //Default English )
switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Opretter af', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Erstellt von', True, 'Created By' //Default English )
switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Total betalt beløb', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Bezahlter Gesamtbetrag', True, 'Total paid amount' //Default English )
switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Betalt dokument', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Bezahltes Dokument', True, 'Paid Doc.' //Default English )
switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Dok. Num.', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Dok. Num.', True, 'Doc. No.' //Default English )
switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Indgående kreditnota', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Eingangsgutschrift', True, 'A/P Credit note' //Default English )
switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Indgående forudbetaling', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Einkaufsanzahlungsrechnung', True, 'A/P Down Payment' //Default English )
switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Betalte dokumenter:', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Bezahlte Dokumente:', True, 'Paid Documents:' //Default English )
switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Totale betalingsmåder', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Totale Zahlungsarten', True, 'Total Payment Means' //Default English )

switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Kontonr.', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Kontonr.', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Kontonummer', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Número de cuenta', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Tilinumero', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Rekeningnr.', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Numéro de compte', True, 'Account' //Default English )

switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Bankadresse', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Bankadresse', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Bankanschrift', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Dirección de banco', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Pankin osoite', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Bankadres', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Adresse de la banque', True, 'Bank-address' //Default English )

switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', {@CompanyInfo_Name}+ chr(13)+chr(13)+ {@CompanyInfo_Address_Full}+chr(13) +chr(13)+ 'Tlf: '+{@CompanyInfo_Phone1}+chr(13)+ 'Fax: '+{@CompanyInfo_Fax}+chr(13)+ 'Email: '+{@CompanyInfo_Email}+chr(13)+ 'Web: '+{@CompanyInfo_Website}+chr(13)+ chr(13)+ 'EU-momsnr.: '+{@CompanyInfo_FederalTaxId} , {@X_Language} = 'NO', {@CompanyInfo_Name}+ chr(13)+chr(13)+ {@CompanyInfo_Address_Full}+chr(13) +chr(13)+ 'Tlf: '+{@CompanyInfo_Phone1}+chr(13)+ 'Fax: '+{@CompanyInfo_Fax}+chr(13)+ 'E-Post: '+{@CompanyInfo_Email}+chr(13)+ 'Web: '+{@CompanyInfo_Website}+chr(13)+ chr(13)+ 'Unikt org.nr: '+{@CompanyInfo_FederalTaxId} , {@X_Language} = 'DE', {@CompanyInfo_Name}+ chr(13)+chr(13)+ {@CompanyInfo_Address_Full}+chr(13) +chr(13)+ 'Tel: '+{@CompanyInfo_Phone1}+chr(13)+ 'Fax: '+{@CompanyInfo_Fax}+chr(13)+ 'Email: '+{@CompanyInfo_Email}+chr(13)+ 'Webseite: '+{@CompanyInfo_Website}+chr(13)+ chr(13)+ 'Ust-ID: '+{@CompanyInfo_FederalTaxId} , {@X_Language} = 'ES', {@CompanyInfo_Name}+ chr(13)+chr(13)+ {@CompanyInfo_Address_Full}+chr(13) +chr(13)+ 'Tél: '+{@CompanyInfo_Phone1}+chr(13)+ 'Fax: '+{@CompanyInfo_Fax}+chr(13)+ 'Email: '+{@CompanyInfo_Email}+chr(13)+ 'Sitio Web: '+{@CompanyInfo_Website}+chr(13)+ chr(13)+ 'NIF: '+{@CompanyInfo_FederalTaxId} , {@X_Language} = 'FI', {@CompanyInfo_Name}+ chr(13)+chr(13)+ {@CompanyInfo_Address_Full}+chr(13) +chr(13)+ 'Puh: '+{@CompanyInfo_Phone1}+chr(13)+ 'Fax: '+{@CompanyInfo_Fax}+chr(13)+ 'S-posti: '+{@CompanyInfo_Email}+chr(13)+ 'www: '+{@CompanyInfo_Website}+chr(13)+ chr(13)+ 'Y-tunnus: '+{@CompanyInfo_FederalTaxId} , {@X_Language} = 'NL', {@CompanyInfo_Name}+ chr(13)+chr(13)+ {@CompanyInfo_Address_Full}+chr(13) +chr(13)+ 'Tel: '+{@CompanyInfo_Phone1}+chr(13)+ 'Fax: '+{@CompanyInfo_Fax}+chr(13)+ 'Email: '+{@CompanyInfo_Email}+chr(13)+ 'Website: '+{@CompanyInfo_Website}+chr(13)+ chr(13)+ 'BTW-nr: '+{@CompanyInfo_FederalTaxId} , {@X_Language} = 'FR', {@CompanyInfo_Name}+ chr(13)+chr(13)+ {@CompanyInfo_Address_Full}+chr(13) +chr(13)+ 'Tél: '+{@CompanyInfo_Phone1}+chr(13)+ 'Télécopieur: '+{@CompanyInfo_Fax}+chr(13)+ 'Email: '+{@CompanyInfo_Email}+chr(13)+ 'Site Web: '+{@CompanyInfo_Website}+chr(13)+ chr(13)+ 'Numéro de TVA: '+{@CompanyInfo_FederalTaxId} , True, {@CompanyInfo_Name}+ chr(13)+chr(13)+ {@CompanyInfo_Address_Full}+chr(13) +chr(13)+ 'Tel: '+{@CompanyInfo_Phone1}+chr(13)+ 'Fax: '+{@CompanyInfo_Fax}+chr(13)+ 'Email: '+{@CompanyInfo_Email}+chr(13)+ 'Web: '+{@CompanyInfo_Website}+chr(13)+ chr(13)+ 'Federal Tax Id: '+{@CompanyInfo_FederalTaxId}
//Default English )

switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', {@CompanyInfo_Name}+' - '+ {@CompanyInfo_Address_Street}+' - '+ {@CompanyInfo_Address_Country}+{@CompanyInfo_Address_Zipcode}+' '+{@CompanyInfo_Address_City}+' - '+ 'Tlf: '+{@CompanyInfo_Phone1}+' - '+ 'Fax: '+{@CompanyInfo_Fax}+' - '+ 'Email: '+{@CompanyInfo_Email}+' - '+ 'Web: '+{@CompanyInfo_Website}+' - '+ 'CVR: '+{@CompanyInfo_FederalTaxId} , {@X_Language} = 'NO', {@CompanyInfo_Name}+' - '+ {@CompanyInfo_Address_Street}+' - '+ {@CompanyInfo_Address_Country}+{@CompanyInfo_Address_Zipcode}+' '+{@CompanyInfo_Address_City}+' - '+ 'Tlf: '+{@CompanyInfo_Phone1}+' - '+ 'Fax: '+{@CompanyInfo_Fax}+' - '+ 'E-Post: '+{@CompanyInfo_Email}+' - '+ 'Web: '+{@CompanyInfo_Website}+' - '+ 'Unikt org.nr: '+{@CompanyInfo_FederalTaxId} , {@X_Language} = 'DE', {@CompanyInfo_Name}+' - '+ {@CompanyInfo_Address_Street}+' - '+ {@CompanyInfo_Address_Country}+{@CompanyInfo_Address_Zipcode}+' '+{@CompanyInfo_Address_City}+' - '+ 'Tel: '+{@CompanyInfo_Phone1}+' - '+ 'Fax: '+{@CompanyInfo_Fax}+' - '+ 'Email: '+{@CompanyInfo_Email}+' - '+ 'Webseite: '+{@CompanyInfo_Website}+' - '+ 'Ust-ID: '+{@CompanyInfo_FederalTaxId} , {@X_Language} = 'ES', {@CompanyInfo_Name}+' - '+ {@CompanyInfo_Address_Street}+' - '+ {@CompanyInfo_Address_Country}+{@CompanyInfo_Address_Zipcode}+' '+{@CompanyInfo_Address_City}+' - '+ 'Tél: '+{@CompanyInfo_Phone1}+' - '+ 'Fax: '+{@CompanyInfo_Fax}+' - '+ 'Email: '+{@CompanyInfo_Email}+' - '+ 'Sitio Web: '+{@CompanyInfo_Website}+' - '+ 'NIF: '+{@CompanyInfo_FederalTaxId} , {@X_Language} = 'FI', {@CompanyInfo_Name}+' - '+ {@CompanyInfo_Address_Street}+' - '+ {@CompanyInfo_Address_Country}+{@CompanyInfo_Address_Zipcode}+' '+{@CompanyInfo_Address_City}+' - '+ 'Puh: '+{@CompanyInfo_Phone1}+' - '+ 'Fax: '+{@CompanyInfo_Fax}+' - '+ 'S-posti: '+{@CompanyInfo_Email}+' - '+ 'www: '+{@CompanyInfo_Website}+' - '+ 'Y-tunnus: '+{@CompanyInfo_FederalTaxId} , {@X_Language} = 'NL', {@CompanyInfo_Name}+' - '+ {@CompanyInfo_Address_Street}+' - '+ {@CompanyInfo_Address_Country}+{@CompanyInfo_Address_Zipcode}+' '+{@CompanyInfo_Address_City}+' - '+ 'Tel: '+{@CompanyInfo_Phone1}+' - '+ 'Fax: '+{@CompanyInfo_Fax}+' - '+ 'Email: '+{@CompanyInfo_Email}+' - '+ 'Website: '+{@CompanyInfo_Website}+' - '+ 'BTW-nr: '+{@CompanyInfo_FederalTaxId} , {@X_Language} = 'FR', {@CompanyInfo_Name}+' - '+ {@CompanyInfo_Address_Street}+' - '+ {@CompanyInfo_Address_Country}+{@CompanyInfo_Address_Zipcode}+' '+{@CompanyInfo_Address_City}+' - '+ 'Tél: '+{@CompanyInfo_Phone1}+' - '+ 'Télécopieur: '+{@CompanyInfo_Fax}+' - '+ 'Email: '+{@CompanyInfo_Email}+' - '+ 'Site Web: '+{@CompanyInfo_Website}+' - '+ 'Numéro de TVA: '+{@CompanyInfo_FederalTaxId} , True, {@CompanyInfo_Name}+' - '+ {@CompanyInfo_Address_Street}+' - '+ {@CompanyInfo_Address_Country}+{@CompanyInfo_Address_Zipcode}+' '+{@CompanyInfo_Address_City}+' - '+ 'Tel: '+{@CompanyInfo_Phone1}+' - '+ 'Fax: '+{@CompanyInfo_Fax}+' - '+ 'Email: '+{@CompanyInfo_Email}+' - '+ 'Web: '+{@CompanyInfo_Website}+' - '+ 'Federal Tax Id: '+{@CompanyInfo_FederalTaxId} //Default English )

switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Side: '+ ToText(PageNumber,'#') +' af '+Totext(TotalPageCount,'#'), {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Side: '+ ToText(PageNumber,'#') +' av '+Totext(TotalPageCount,'#'), {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Seite: '+ ToText(PageNumber,'#') +' von '+Totext(TotalPageCount,'#'), {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Página: '+ ToText(PageNumber,'#') +' de '+Totext(TotalPageCount,'#'), {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Pagina: '+ ToText(PageNumber,'#') +' van '+Totext(TotalPageCount,'#'), {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Page: '+ ToText(PageNumber,'#') +' de '+Totext(TotalPageCount,'#'), TRUE, 'Page: '+ ToText(PageNumber,'#') +' of '+Totext(TotalPageCount,'#') )

Row.F: 300 Billings Drive Suite 500 Havertown PA 19083 USA
